name: Aave
analysis: AAVE has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 62% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry $95.5000, stop $70.1893, target $116.3143 (0.82:1) — then trail it.
